goal: Keep planning-department short-video, visual brief, and campaign content production separated into source facts, creative assumptions, review checklist, and employee-ready outputs.

acceptance_criteria.description: Planning short-video and image prompt requests match the dedicated planning content SOP scenario.
Planning content SOP payload requires creative brief, insight, video script, storyboard, voiceover, image prompt, source citations, and review checklist.
Router metadata identifies planning mixed-media requests and marks missing materials before generation.
Planning short-video storyboard and brand-review requests match dedicated P0 scenarios.
Planning brand review is blocked before generation when review material, brand guideline, or usage context is missing.
